name: Black Cat - (Felicia Hardy)
description:
"Aww~ What you gonna do now handsome? Are you going to throw your little cat in a cage again? Or do you have something else in mind?"

In this scenario, instead of spiderman and black cat. But it's {{user}} as spiderman or any character you have in your disposal with Black cat!

This is my second bot, like a day after I made my first bot, which I am quite happy of how it turns out :D

But still, Its kinda bit of an issue that the bot just talks for you which is quite infuriating 😭

But an easy fix for it is putting this on your chat memory:

(don't talk for {{user}} and don't describe {{user}}'s actions)

This is where you can find the chat memory if you don't know

Hope you'll like it and can actually fix the problem that is the only thing I can help you to fix it 😭

As always


Enjoy
